sharedPost.text:
Some of the wonderful feedback I’ve been receiving from my adult classes! 🥰🙌 Means a lot to know that they feel supported, comfortable and encouraged in my sessions. 

Knowing that my group can leave their hang-ups at the door, get more active and experience the JOY of dance means the world!

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6)

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

items.text:
Hey everyone! One of our lead actors had to drop out, and we’re looking for a strong musical theater performer to step in. The show runs **April 17–19** at **5709 Wedgwood Drive, Fort Worth**. Rehearsals are already in progress, so the person needs to **learn quickly**. They should be able to **sing “Turn Back O Man” confidently**.

If you or someone you know can do this, please send a **1–2 minute video** of a similar song and a quick note about your experience and availability to wedgwoodarts@gmail.com. Rehearsals are on Mondays and Thursdays from 7-10 and Saturdays from 9-1. We’re hoping to cast **within the next 48 hours**, so act fast!

Please share this with anyone who might be a fit. Thanks!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎥🎬 per spot internazionale! 🌎

CERCHIAMO:

DONNE dai 25 ai 50 anni
UOMINI dai 25 agli 80 anni
Di TUTTE le ETNIE
RESIDENTI O DOMICILIATI IN FRIULI VENEZIA GIULIA O VENETO
 
𝐀𝐫𝐞𝐚: Italia e Slovenia
𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐠𝐧𝐨 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨: dal 21 al 27 MARZO
📌𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗢𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗚: Slovenia

- LAVORO RETRIBUITO -

💻Se siete interessati INVIATE UNA MAIL A 📧: Spot.galaxiacasting@gmail.com
𝐎𝐆𝐆𝐄𝐓𝐓𝐎: casting SPOT_nome cognome

Nella mail indicare:
- Nome e cognome 
- Data e luogo di nascita
- Indirizzo di residenza
- Contatto telefonico
- Misure aggiornate: altezza, peso, numero di scarpe, taglia giacca e pantaloni

𝘼𝙡𝙡𝙚𝙜𝙖𝙧𝙚:
- 3 foto aggiornate (primo piano, mezzo busto e figura intera) 

Vi aspettiamo! 🤍 GALAXIA

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

 📌 Osoby dorosłe jako uczestnicy konkursu muzycznego 

 Stawka:

📌 170 zł platne po planie

👫 Panie i Panowie  wiek 65 + jako uczestnicy potańcówki

Stawka:

📌 170 zł 

Zainteresowane osoby zapraszam do zgloszen na adres mailowy :

marlena.kamedstudio@gmail.com załączając :

📌 2 dobrej jakości zdjęcia najlepiej z dzisiaj twarz i sylwetka bez okularow przeciwsłonecznych oraz nakryć głowy

📌 Wiek

📌 Nr telefonu

Wybory są reżyserskie, odezwiemy się do wybranych osób.

Dopisek 12 Marca

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Waffen SS ( szeregowy – jednostka rozpoznawcza )**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 40** lat o wzroście 170 - 180  cm, pas 90/100 i **obwód klatki do 90/105cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków** w tym połowa z nich jest z żołnierzami.

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Szukam aktorki do wertykalnego serialu!
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 60–70 lat z bardzo dobrą znajomością języka angielskiego.
Okres zdjęć: 19–30 kwietnia (2–3 dni zdjęciowe dla tej roli) w Warsaw.
Serial **„BRAVE DOLL”** na platformie MyDrama.
Stawka wynosi **1600 zł brutto** za dzień zdjęciowy.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana, poproszę o nagranie self-tape’u
Poproszę również o następujące informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, lokalizacja, wzrost, doświadczenie aktorskie / wykształcenie aktorskie, a także aktualne zdjęcie portretowe

Proszę pisać w wiadomościach prywatnych — prześlę scenę do nagrania.

Deadline do 08.03 do 15:00

items.text:
Open Call In Person Auditions Mon. & Tues. March 9 & 10 at 6pm for **9 to 5**, Music & Lyrics by Dolly Parton, Book by Patricia Resnick, Directed by Felisha Heng - Musical Director Chelsea Melnick, Choreographer Cassandra Reed. Performances: May 1-17; Fri. & Sat. 8pm & Sundays 2pm. Auditions @HeightsPlayers 26 Willow Place Brooklyn, NY 11201. (718) 237-2752.

 

Please prepare 32 bars of a musical theater song in the style of the show that best fits and showcases your range. Be creative! We are looking for engaging and energetic storytellers. Give your audition as much character (and camp!) as possible! Please bring a headshot and resume. An accompanist will be provided. Please bring clearly marked sheet music in the correct key and do not sing acapella. There will NOT be a dance call at auditions. Only those invited to callbacks will participate in a dance call.

 

We are seeking a diverse cast of performers for a range of roles. Performers of all genders are encouraged to audition for ALL roles, we are casting all roles without gender restrictions. BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ performers are strongly encouraged to audition.

 

NO pay.

 

**Character Breakdown:**

**Violet Newstead**: The company's Head Secretary and Mr. Hart's Administrative Assistant, she is a single mother and typically stands up for what she believes in. Attractive, strong, ambitious. Age 40 to 50

**Doralee Rhodes**: A young, sexy spitfire who works at Mr. Hart's office. She is proof that there is more to a woman than just her looks. Age: 20 to 30

**Judy Bernly**: The "new" girl at the firm, she has been burned by her husband's affair and is searching for personal empowerment. Insecure, determined, and hopeful. Age: 30 to 35

**Franklin Hart, JR.** : One of the firm's executives and a notorious chauvinist. He is capable of faking charm but usually shows his true colors as an arrogant, self-absorbed boss. Age: 45 to 50

**Roz Keith**: The attentive office gossip queen and snitch. She has an unrequited love for Mr. Hart and will do anything she can to win his approval. Age: 35 to 45

**Joe**: A handsome, young office accountant. Genuine and nice, and smitten with Violet. Age: 25 to 35

**Dwayne**: Doralee's attractive husband. He is very supportive of her professional pursuits. Age: 25 to 30

**Josh**: Violet's awkward teenage son. Age: 15 to 18

**Missy**: Franklin Hart's wife, clueless to her husband's true nature. Age: 20 to 35

**Maria**: A young and vibrant secretary in Hart's office. Age: 20 to 30

**Dick**: Judy's soon-to-be ex-husband. An average guy, he is sporting a little less hair and a little more paunch than he did ten years ago. Age: 35 to 45

**Kathy**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to gossip. Age: 30 to 40

**Margaret**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to drink. Age: 30 to 40

**Tinsworthy**: Franklin Hart's boss and Chairman of the Board. A good man, who may be wiser to Hart's ways than he lets on. Age: 50 to 65

**Ensemble**: Office employees, police officers, hospital employees.

[https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/](https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/)

**Joe**: A handsome, young office accountant. Genuine and nice, and smitten with Violet. Age: 25 to 35

**Dwayne**: Doralee's attractive husband. He is very supportive of her professional pursuits. Age: 25 to 30

**Josh**: Violet's awkward teenage son. Age: 15 to 18

**Missy**: Franklin Hart's wife, clueless to her husband's true nature. Age: 20 to 35

**Maria**: A young and vibrant secretary in Hart's office. Age: 20 to 30

**Dick**: Judy's soon-to-be ex-husband. An average guy, he is sporting a little less hair and a little more paunch than he did ten years ago. Age: 35 to 45

**Kathy**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to gossip. Age: 30 to 40

**Margaret**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to drink. Age: 30 to 40

**Tinsworthy**: Franklin Hart's boss and Chairman of the Board. A good man, who may be wiser to Hart's ways than he lets on. Age: 50 to 65

**Ensemble**: Office employees, police officers, hospital employees.

[https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/](https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

This is an unpaid acting opportunity that takes approx. 5 mins.

We will credit you and you can use the experience on your resume as being in an advert. 

There is no travel, as long as you have a good quality set up and can record yourself saying a few words approx. 10-20 secs and send to us. 

Email hi@coconutspaces.com and I will send you a script. You record in your own time and send back. After editing we will send the entire advert to you to add to your portfolio. 

Seeking all ages 18-99 all sexes and genders All races - everyone welcome! 

Much Love, 

www.coconutspaces.com

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Casting Call - Paid, Non-union
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video.

**Looking for:**
• 1 Hispanic male, age 30–50
• 1 Hispanic female, age 25–45
• 1 Hispanic child (male or female), age 5–8

Actors who are mixed race or of ambiguous ethnicity with darker skin tones are also encouraged to apply. All submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

Preference will be given to real families or real relationships (mother/child, husband/wife, etc.), but individual applicants are absolutely welcome to apply as well.

**About the project:**
The shoot is for a pinworm medication product video. The scenes will be very simple and include showcasing the medication along with lifestyle moments of a family in home and park environments.

**Location:** TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

**Date:** TBD - sometime between mid-March and the end of March. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

**Pay:** $120 per talent for approximately 3–4 hours.

**To Apply:**
Please email **runestonepics@gmail.com** with:
• Your availability
• Recent photos or headshots
• Your location

Subject line: **“Family Casting”**

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.text:
Calling all Sustainable Crafty Pros! 🍎♻️
Are you a Crafty professional who’s passionate about cutting down on single-use plastics and food waste on set?

Planet in Mind is looking for sustainable-minded Crafty vendors and experts to join our Sustainable Production Practices Showcase during LA Climate Week (April 8th–15th)!

We want to give you a platform (and a booth!) to show the industry how the Crafty table can be both delicious and eco-friendly. Whether you’ve mastered bulk-buying, compostable swap-outs, or zero-waste setups, we want you to be part of the conversation.

You’ll be alongside leaders from the Mayor’s Office of Energy & Sustainability, the Sustainable Entertainment Alliance, and the Green Film School Alliance as we show the industry "what happens when we get it right" - the theme of LA Climate Week.

Interested in hosting a booth or sharing your expertise?

Please reach out to me directly at: tauna@planetinmind.earth

Let’s make LA sets greener, one snack at a time! 🌿🎬

#LAClimateWeek #SustainableFilm #Crafty #GreenProduction #FilmCrewLA #PlanetInMind

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Elisabeth Monamy über das Out-Of-The-Box-Denken. 

 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 166. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 17.03.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Dr. Paul Hertel 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Regionales und internationales Kunstschaffen – wie gelingt nachhaltiger Erfolg im Musikbusiness? 

Der Komponist, Produzent, Autor und Vizepräsident der AKM Dr. Paul Hertel spricht über das Leben als Künstler zwischen regionaler Verankerung und internationaler Präsenz. Wo liegen Chancen, wo Risiken? Und wie kann man sich trotz KI, Marktveränderungen und steigender Konkurrenz langfristig einen eigenständigen Platz erarbeiten und sichern? 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die künstlerisch denken und unternehmerisch handeln wollen. 

© privat 

 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/8GQHxpy5q 

 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #musik #akm #composer

message.text:
Na na na, wo siehst du hin😉 

Wir feiern die Woche starker und selbstbewusster Frauen 💐 
Die Atelier Galerie Roland Puschitz zeigt diese Woche 2 Ausstellungen zum Thema 👍 
Morgen Dienstag 03.03.2026 um 19:00 Uhr die erst im Amtshaus Wieden, kommt vorbei und hört wundervolle Musik in Frauentöne von CLARIVOCE und beäugt dabei die selbstbewussten Bilder von Judith Reßler. 

Die Ausschnitte in diesem Reel versprechen sehr spannende Kunstwerke. 

Amtshaus Festsaal Wieden 
Favoritenstraße 18,  1040 Wien 

www.puschitz.at 
https://www.puschitz.at/verkauf/ 

Gratis Platzreservierungen unter 
roland@puschitz.at 
+436765219895 

#ateliergalerierolandpuschitz #rolandpuschitz
#contemporary #follower #judithressler

# **CASTING CALL!!** - *BRISTOL* 
# SHORT STUDENT FILM - 'THE LOCK INN'
# LOOKING FOR 3 SUPPORTING MALE ROLES.

FILM SUMMARY: A savvy bartender and her layabout coworkers must prevent the spread of a zombie-like virus outbreak in their small town, which turns their rude, ungrateful regulars into deadly, flesh-hungry crawlers. Can she find a way to survive with her fellow bar staff, or die in a dead-end job?

SHOOTING DATES: 23rd - 27th March.

Owing to this being a low-budget student production, we will offer an honorarium of £50 and cover all travel and food expenses for the shoots.

NOTE: This short may also be submitted to festivals or published on social media. All roles listed will require “zombie-fied” makeup, performed by our makeup artist. This will be minor and non-invasive.

# If interested: Please email [Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education](mailto:Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education) 
# To send through a headshot/showreel. 

# DEADLINE: 8PM - 12TH MARCH 2026

items.text:
Blink Films is making a documentary for BBC Arts about important books in people's lives, and we would like to hear from you!

Did a single book completely transform your life?

Did reading it inspire you to make a huge change?

Did it encourage you to leave the rat race and pursue something totally different?

Or was reading a challenge that once conquered, inspired you to do something remarkable?

If so, we'd love to hear your stories! 

Please email us at: Reading@blinkfilmsuk.com. Tell us your story and tell us what the book was, what it inspired you to do or change in your life, why it proved so monumental and a contact number!

(Deadline 18th March 2026)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - STUDENT COMEDY MINI-SERIES**

Hi! We’re looking to cast **four student actors** as the main ensemble of our upcoming comedy mini-series.

We are **graduating film students at MetFilm School London**, producing a **sitcom-style mini-series** about a struggling amateur band preparing to perform their **first live gig**.

The series centres around **miscommunication**. These musicians desperately want to be heard by the world - but struggle to hear each other.

**Meet the Band**

**ELLIOT - Lead Singer / Songwriter**
*A tortured artist; Elliot is a volatile mix of ego and insecurity.* Convinced he’s destined for greatness, he struggles with patience, collaboration, and attention. Underneath the drama is a sensitive musician desperate to be heard.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**JEFFERY - Bassist**
Cocky, outgoing, and the life of the party, Jeffery is always chasing the next thrill — girls, nights out, or anything exciting — which often makes him lose focus on the band. He must learn that being part of something bigger means staying focused and taking responsibility.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**ED (EDWARD) - Drummer**
Shy, lovable, and slightly in his own world, Ed plays music for connection rather than ambition. Honest and naive, he brings warmth to the group, but needs to learn that it’s okay to speak up for more than eight words at a time.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**MICHELLE - The Unappointed Manager**

Organised, witty, and outspoken, Michelle keeps the band in check. She lives with Elliot and Jeffery and is constantly dealing with their chaotic mistakes. Though she insists she’s only trying to keep things under control, she secretly enjoys managing the band’s dysfunction — and must eventually decide whether to step back or fully embrace the role she’s created for herself.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**Production Details**

• **Location:** London
• **Shoot:** 9-10 days in mid-April
• **Dates:** Within **14-26 April** (exact dates TBC)
• **Compensation:** Unpaid student production
• **Travel expenses covered**
• **Catering provided on set**

Throughout the series, the band faces a series of obstacles while trying to **book their first gig and finally perform live**, navigating ego clashes, poor communication, and the chaos of working together.

We’re looking for **energetic performers with strong comedic instincts** who enjoy collaborative student productions.

**For enquiries please contact:** srtmghfilm@gmail.com | +44 7392 408865 🎬

Sign up here to apply: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)

topComments.text: 9-10 days work for no pay is absolutely diabolical

We are **graduating film students at MetFilm School London**, producing a **sitcom-style mini-series** about a struggling amateur band preparing to perform their **first live gig**.

The series centres around **miscommunication**. These musicians desperately want to be heard by the world - but struggle to hear each other.

**Meet the Band**

**ELLIOT - Lead Singer / Songwriter**
*A tortured artist; Elliot is a volatile mix of ego and insecurity.* Convinced he’s destined for greatness, he struggles with patience, collaboration, and attention. Underneath the drama is a sensitive musician desperate to be heard.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**JEFFERY - Bassist**
Cocky, outgoing, and the life of the party, Jeffery is always chasing the next thrill — girls, nights out, or anything exciting — which often makes him lose focus on the band. He must learn that being part of something bigger means staying focused and taking responsibility.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**ED (EDWARD) - Drummer**
Shy, lovable, and slightly in his own world, Ed plays music for connection rather than ambition. Honest and naive, he brings warmth to the group, but needs to learn that it’s okay to speak up for more than eight words at a time.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**MICHELLE - The Unappointed Manager**

Organised, witty, and outspoken, Michelle keeps the band in check. She lives with Elliot and Jeffery and is constantly dealing with their chaotic mistakes. Though she insists she’s only trying to keep things under control, she secretly enjoys managing the band’s dysfunction — and must eventually decide whether to step back or fully embrace the role she’s created for herself.
**Playing Age:** 20-25

**Production Details**

• **Location:** London
• **Shoot:** 9-10 days in mid-April
• **Dates:** Within **14-26 April** (exact dates TBC)
• **Compensation:** Unpaid student production
• **Travel expenses covered**
• **Catering provided on set**

Throughout the series, the band faces a series of obstacles while trying to **book their first gig and finally perform live**, navigating ego clashes, poor communication, and the chaos of working together.

We’re looking for **energetic performers with strong comedic instincts** who enjoy collaborative student productions.

**For enquiries please contact:** srtmghfilm@gmail.com | +44 7392 408865 🎬

Sign up here to apply: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPpm4grUb84fzpQU3m5cpTzz5q6bIY4W2mxeAKltTcWXUmkg/viewform?usp=dialog)
items.title: **CASTING CALL - STUDENT COMEDY MINI-SERIES**

items.text:
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 
Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

items.text:
Hi FIND-ers! The Women in Film and Media Colorado annual Industry Fair is this weekend! We are celebrating our 10 year anniversary this year and things are bigger and better than ever! Lunch is included with your ticket each day! Link in the comments to get your tickets. If Cost is an issue, please reach out and we can figure something out!

Opening Night   | February 27 | 7 pm 

Start the Industry Fair the best way possible— with a drink in hand and a room full of filmmakers ready to connect. Join us for the Opening Night Cocktail Party at [Cabin House Studios](https://www.cabinhousestudios.com/), featuring powerhouse Miranda Bailey in conversation—a candid, energizing chat packed with real-world insight and creative momentum.

Day 1 | February 28 | 9am - 6pm

Community College of Aurora
9075 E Lowry Blvd, Denver, CO 80230

Dive into developing and marketing a vertical/web series, sharpen your interview looks with Mary Jeanes & Cheshire Li or learn insider tips on freelancing from Shawna Schultz.   Prefer hands-on storytelling? Jump into a two-part scene lab or catch a directing workshop with a Hollywood director Sarah Adina Smith. Spend the afternoon discovering the ins and outs of festivals with Eileen O'Brien, learn about Colorado’s refundable tax credit or check out the detailed craft of special effects makeup with Stephanie Lane and Michelle Knoebel. Wrap the day with industry insights on the director/casting director relationship with Nell Teare and Jamie Castro and a final panel on "Breaking IN: How did you do that?

Day 2 | March 1 | 9am - 6pm

Learn the *Principles of Film Adaptation with *Trai Cartwright, *Audition Techniques from a TV & Film Casting Director with Jamie Castro Casting* or jump into hands-on sessions like *Scene Lab Day 2*. The afternoon keeps the momentum going with a short documentary session with Jenna Red, filmmaking career strategy with Roe Moore, *Best Practices for Auditions & Callbacks with Intimacy* and everyone’s favorite stunts workshop with Sara Salazar & friends.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'INDUSTRV FAIR WOMEN IN FILM & ILM&MEDIA MEDIA -Colorado FEB 27- MAR 2026 OUR ANNUAL WEEKEND OF HANDS-ONWORKSHOPS, HANDS-ON WORKSHOPS, INDUSTRY PANELS AND COLORADO FILM COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS. PASSES ON SALE NOW! www.wifmco.org/industry-fai-2026 2026 COMMUNITY COLLEGE of AURORA cabin house #개체하의'

items.text:
LOS ANGELES AUDITIONS
Rajasthani Performance Intensive

Directed by Katrina Ji — international performer and specialist in Rajasthani folk traditions

A selective training and performance pathway for dancers seeking depth in authentic Rajasthani folk traditions fused with Bollywood stage performance.

This audition is for dancers interested in joining a new professional performing ensemble currently being formed in Los Angeles.

This work requires discipline, musical intelligence, and cultural respect.

This is not a drop-in class.

This is a curated artistic process.

⸻

Initial Audition

Tuesday, March 24

7:00–9:00 PM

Location

Gypsy Camp Ethnic Arts Center

3265 Motor Avenue

Los Angeles, CA 90034

(On Motor Ave just north of National Blvd)

Selected dancers will be invited into a 6-week performance intensive beginning the following week.

⸻

6-Week Intensive Training

12 hours total training

Dancers will train in:

• Rajasthani folk movement vocabulary

• Rhythmic musicality

• Cultural context and authenticity

• Performance staging and theatrical presence

• Choreographic precision

Investment: $350

Limited to 4–6 dancers to ensure serious training, individual correction, and artistic development.

⸻

Final Audition

At the conclusion of the intensive, dancers will participate in a second audition.

A small elite performing unit will be selected to join a new professional Rajasthani performance ensemble currently being developed under Rajasthani Caravan.

⸻

Professional Performance Pathway

Selected dancers will:

• Perform in professional stage productions

• Receive paid performance opportunities ($250–$450 per show)

• Participate in ongoing rehearsals

• Contribute $50 monthly studio dues to cover rehearsal space

Commitment: 6 months

Due to the focused nature of this ensemble, this opportunity will not reopen again for quite some time.

⸻

Seeking Dancers With

• Strong technical foundation

• Musical sensitivity and rhythmic awareness

• Ability to learn choreography quickly

• Professional reliability and stage discipline

• Respect for traditional cultural forms

Experience in Bollywood, Indian classical dance, contemporary, bellydance or world dance is welcome.

Dancers should be comfortable working in a professional rehearsal environment where precision and cultural authenticity are expected.

⸻

To Apply

Email: rajasthanicaravan@gmail.com

Please include:

• Headshot

• 1-minute dance reel

• Brief statement of interest

Serious inquiries only.

CALLING EASTERN EUROPEAN ARTISTS

We are putting together a curated performance evening featuring Eastern European artists based in the UK.

We’re looking for performers who would like to share a short piece inspired by real stories and themes of identity, culture, family, and living between places.

Monologue • Poetry • Music • Movement

If this resonates with you and you’d like to take part, send us a message.

Must be available on the 12th of April - performance date, plus rehearsals prior to that 

Venue: OSO Arts Centre 

Please, contact me for more details: maria.stana10@gmail.com 

📍 London
🎭 Limited number of performers

items.text:
🔥** AUDITION CALL – PROFESSIONAL HEELS / HIP-HOP TEAM **🔥

**PAID WORK.   Spots are limited. Serious dancers only.**

**We are looking for 3 strong, versatile female dancers to join a professional Heels/Hip-Hop performance team for a short season. This is your opportunity to train and perform.**

✨** We’re Looking For:**

**• Women 18+,  Minimum height 5’6” (without heels)**

**• Strong foundation in Heels and/or Hip-Hop**

**• Performance quality and stage presence**

**• Confidence, musicality, and work ethic**

**• Commitment to rehearsals and bookings. The show routine you will learn to perform will be approximately three minute. **

💃** What You’ll Be Part Of:**

**• Professional performances & showcases**

**• High-quality concept videos**

**• Brand collaborations & paid opportunities**

**• Intensive training & choreography development**

**• A powerful, supportive team culture**

💰** Paid training & 6 performances. **

💐**show dates (performers must be able to do at least three or more of these dates (showtimes will be in the evening approximately 10 pm):**

20 April  Mon. Wimbledon 

25 April  Sat. Putney

29 April  Wed. Hammersmith  

1 May Fri - Fulham

5 May Tues - Fulham 

7  May Thur Earls Court

📍** Audition Details:**

**Date:   14th March 2026**

**Time:   4-6pm**

**Location: Dance Attic Studios, Fulham. **

**Dress Code: Form-fitting dancewear + heels**

**Bring: Heels,  Knee pads & water**

🎥** To Apply - register for free through website. **

**Deadline:   13th March (11:59pm)**

[https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/](https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/)

items.text:
Hot take: commercials are not the enemy. They are creative, fast, and one of the best places to learn how to act on camera and get paid while doing it 😉 

If commercials feel intimidating, our A–Z Commercial Acting Class helps you understand what casting is looking for and how to bring your personality into the room!

Learn more about the A–Z Commercial Acting Class here: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#a-z-commercial-acting

Китай, город Xu Zhou, провинция Jiang Su. 

Парк Xuzhou Amusement Land . 

Старт по готовности документов. 

Контракт на 8+ месяцев

⚠️НАМ НУЖНЫ ⚠️ 

✨- Девушки танцоры  ( рост от 167)

📍Рабочая виза 

📍Билеты в две стороны

📍Выходной 1 в неделю

items.text:
**CASTING MALE DANCERS & MOVERS**

**We are currently accepting virtual submissions for MALE DANCERS & MOVERS to join the cast of International Star Illusionist Brad Ross’ Magic & Illusion Show.**

**Perform in a high-energy production touring this summer with TWO residencies at Six Flags Theme Parks and live audiences across the country.**

**We’re looking for performers who are:**

**• Energetic and charismatic**

**• Comfortable performing multiple dance styles**

**• Strong team players with great stage presence**

**• Athletic / Great Movers with personality and performance ability**

**MUST BE 18+ and a US CITIZEN**

**PAID SUMMER GIG for 12 Weeks + Travel/ Housing **

**This is an incredible opportunity to perform in a large-scale illusion production show with an amazing cast and crew.**

**Email headshot, resume & dance reel are listed in the post above.**

SHOULDB BE COMFORTABL THVARIOUS TEAM PLAYER ATTITUDE. COMPETTIVE WEEKLY PAY TRAVEL& HOUSING ACCEPTING VIRTUAL SUBMISSIONS EMAIL HEADSHOT, RESUME & DANCE REEL TO CASTING@BRADROSS.COM FOR RMOREINFO VISIT WWW.BRADROSS.COM/AUDITION NON-UNION, COMPETTIV PROFE ESSIONAL WORK NVIRON NT DIVERSIFIEDTRAINING, TRAINING, TERNATIONALLY RENOWNED DIVERSI SHORT OPPORTU'

items.text:
CASTING CALL: YOUNG ELLE
Short Film: Duet

We are currently casting the role of Young Elle for the upcoming short film Duet.

Role

Young Elle

Female

Approximately ages 5 to 7

Young Elle appears in a single memory sequence that reflects the warmth of her relationship with her father before the events of the film unfold. We are looking for a natural and expressive young performer who can bring sincerity and warmth to the role.

Project Details

Independent short film

Non union

Filming in the Denver area

One day of shooting

To Submit

Please send:

Headshot or recent photo

Age and location

Any acting clips if available

Parent or guardian contact information

Submissions can be sent to:

eric@pergafilms.com

Selected applicants will be contacted to audition.

Thank you and we look forward to meeting some wonderful young performers.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I’m looking to cast a featured extra roll for the short film I’m directing on Sunday, March 8th. You will only be needed for one day, and even though it’s not a featured roll, this scene will be a very prominent part of the story. 

Please reach out and submit a headshot to corinne@nymesisstudios.com if you are interested and available! 🤩

ALL AGES 18 WHEN SUNDAY, MARCH 8TH STARTING 11:00 AM LOOKING FOR: 1 COLLEGE-AGED AGED MALE. VICTIM OF A FIGHT No speaking lines, but lots of acting with body language and facial expressions. items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Hauptdarstellerinnen gesucht
Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

📍 Drehort: Stuttgart  

🎥 Produktion: TT Films  

📺 Veröffentlichung: YouTube & weitere Plattformen  

Für unseren neuen intensiven Kurzfilm suchen wir zwei Hauptdarstellerinnen:

✨ LINA (25–30)  

Warm. Emotional offen.  

Augen voller Vertrauen – und Verletzlichkeit.  

Sie liebt tief und ehrlich. Ihre Stärke ist ihre Sanftheit.

✨ SOPHIA (25–30)  

Elegant. Mysteriös. Provozierend.  

Augen wie ein Rätsel.  

Selbstbewusst, kontrolliert – mit einer dunklen Tiefe.

🎭 Genre: Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

Eine Geschichte über Leidenschaft, emotionale Zerrissenheit und psychische Spannung.

ℹ️ Wichtige Infos:  

– Es handelt sich um ein Hobby-/Independent-Projekt  

– Leider keine Gage  

– Der fertige Film kann für euer Portfolio/Showreel genutzt werden  

– Verpflegung am Set ist organisiert  

– Dreh in Stuttgart – Bewerberinnen aus der Nähe bevorzugt  

🎬 Was wir suchen:  

– Ausdrucksstarke Mimik  

– Natürliches, intensives Spiel  

– Zuverlässigkeit & Leidenschaft für Film  

📩 Bewerbung mit:  

– 2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

– Kurze Vorstellung (Name, Alter, Wohnort)  

– Optional: Showreel  

DM oder E-Mail: tt.films@hotmail.com

items.text:
Hallo!😊🎬

Ich freue mich euch einzuladen, als Statist:Innen bei unserem Filmprojekt mitzuwirken. 
Bei Interesse gerne unter gierlinger.hanna@ortweinschule.at melden!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Kein Trip der Welt -Kurzfilm STATIST:INNEN GESUCHT Wolltest du schon immer mal bei einem Film mitmachen? Dann melde dich jetzt bei uns und sei Teil unseres Projekts! Discobesucher:Innen Alter: zwischen 18-26 Jahren Outfit: 2000er Style Ort: Weiz Was du machen musst: Tanzen und Spaß haben Bewerbung unter: gieringer.hanna@ortweinschule.at Bewerbungsunterlagen: Bild oder Video von dir mit einem passenden Outfit Drehtermin: 15.3.2026 in Weiz Ein Projekt der HTBLVA Graz Ortweinschule'

items.text:
Hallo liebe Filmfreunde
Ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und gehe diesen Herbst an die Lazi Filmakademie in Esslingen. Hat jemand schon Erfahrungen mit dieser Schule gemacht, oder geht evt aktuell dorthin und weiß wir das dort mit WG funktioniert. Würde mich mega freuen wenn ihr mich anschreiben würdet und man mal privat reden könnte.

items.text:
STATISTER SØGES TIL KORTFILM (ULØNNET)
Vi er et filmhold fra filmhøjskolen Potemkin i Aarhus og er i gang med at lave en kortfilm, som skal optages ved Hjerl Hede. Hertil har vi brug for statister til at medvirke i en retssagsscene anno 1721.

Lyder det som noget for dig? Så tøv ikke med at kontakte vores producer på:

marie.korsgaard.rasmussen@gmail.com

items.text:
** **

**18 Mini serial wojenny 1940 historyczny z elementami Fantazy**

** **

**Oficer francuski -  mężczyzna**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyznę** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 95 –105 cm, pas: 85 –95 cm** w **wieku 20 – 50** lat do roli oficera francuskiego .Szukamy kogoś mieszkającego w **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest już zrobiony na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego oficera będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po francusku.

 

**Na wiosnę roku 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt a się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. items.text:
Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektaklu

Poszukuję aktorek i aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych) do autorskiego spektaklu opartego na zmyślonych życiorysach trzech sióstr. Szukam dziewczyn do ról: Siostry - śpiewaczki i Siostry - pielęgniarki, a także dwóch-trzech facetów do ról epizodycznych. Premiera spektaklu: początek maja. Projekt z założenia niekomercyjny, chociaż nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może poprowadzić. Proszę o kontakt na priv. Pozdrawiam.

Looking for **identical twin boys or girls (ages 10–16)** for a **paid film shoot** in Los Angeles.

🗣 **English:** Good English required

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM
📍 Grand Rapids, Michigan

KingsVisuals Productions is casting for a faith-based supernatural thriller short film titled “The Price of Power.”

!All races are invited and welcome!

We are currently looking for strong actors for several main roles.
Filming will take place in the Grand Rapids area and is scheduled for Summer 2026.

 IMPORTANT

This is a non-paid project, but actors will receive:
• On-screen film credit
• Professional footage for your reel
• Meals / catering on set
• Transportation support if you live within 30 minutes of Grand Rapids
• Opportunity to work on a high-quality cinematic project
This is a great opportunity for actors who want to build their portfolio, reel, or IMDb credits.

ROLES WE ARE CASTING

GLORIA (Lead Role)
Female | Age 9–12
A strong and intelligent child who carries a mysterious spiritual authority. She must balance innocence with quiet strength.
(Parent/guardian required on set.)

MICHAEL (Lead Role)
Male | Age 25–35
A struggling but compassionate man who unexpectedly becomes Gloria’s protector. Honest, grounded, and emotionally expressive.

NATAS (Main Villain)
Male | Age 30–50
Charismatic yet intimidating supernatural antagonist. Calm, manipulative, and powerful presence.

PASTOR JOHN
Male | Age 35–60
A pastor under financial pressure who becomes tempted by supernatural power. A complex character with a strong emotional arc.

PASTOR SAMUEL
Male | Age 45–75
A wise and spiritually grounded former pastor who understands the ancient covenant behind the rings.

 HOW TO SUBMIT
Please send:
• Your name
• Age
• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting experience (if any)
• Demo reel (optional but preferred)
• Your location
Send submissions to:
📧 Kingsideview@gmail.com

We are building a passionate team for this project and looking for actors who want to be part of something meaningful and cinematic.
Please share this post with actors who may be interested.
🎥 KingsVisuals Productions

items.text:
# Are you a mother who wants to be in front of the camera, a babysitter who knows what kids like, or even somebody that simply has a warm energy and loves kids/babies? 

Orca Live Studios is looking for hosts for the brand Tonies, a toy company that has sold over **134 million Tonies** (physical figures) and more than **10 million **Tonieboxes since their launch in 2014.

This is an in-studio role where you will be the face of the brand, hosting Tonie's livestreams off their brand accounts (80k+ followers) 1-2 times a week. You will be able to gain on camera/hosting experience as well as build a following for yourself, all while having fun. If you're comfortable in front of the camera, come join us!

Rate: $35/hr + Opportunity for commission (rate increase available based on performance) 

*This is an in-studio role in Culver City, Los Angeles*

If you are interested and feel like you'd be a great fit, please message me your email and socials - IG and/or Tiktok 

orcashop.co

items.text:
Werde auch DU Teil von Backstage Event Management – Gemeinsam wachsen. Gemeinsam erfolgreich sein.

Du bist Künstlerin oder Künstler mit Vision, Talent und dem Wunsch nach mehr?
Dann ist jetzt der richtige Moment, den nächsten Schritt zu gehen.

Backstage Event Management steht für professionelle Betreuung, starke Netzwerke und echte Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Ich begleite dich nicht nur – ich baue mit dir deine Marke auf, strategisch, nachhaltig und individuell.

🎤 Künstlervermittlung & Booking
📈 Karriereplanung & strategischer Aufbau
📣 Marketing & Social Media Support
🤝 Zugang zu exklusiven Events & starken Partnern

Ich glaube an Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. An Kreativität mit Struktur. Und an Erfolg, der gemeinsam entsteht.

Egal ob Newcomer oder etablierter Künstlerin – wenn du bereit bist, dein Potenzial voll auszuschöpfen, dann freue ich mich darauf, dich kennenzulernen.

Backstage Event Management – Deine Bühne. Dein Moment. Unser gemeinsamer Weg.

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim

sharedPost.text:
On the occasion of 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻’𝘀 𝗗𝗮𝘆,
​
we are offering a 𝗱𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘄𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻 — a reminder that strength and softness can coexist, and that the body deserves to be listened to, not overridden.
​
𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻
120 minutes of focused abdominal and nervous system work.
Includes an initial anamnesis.
​
🌿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-fur-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.
#BodyworkBerlin #FrauenGesundheitBerlin #bodyworkfrauenBerlin #Zyklusbewusst #frauenmassageberlin #IntegrativeBodywork #weltfrauentag #WomensHealthBerlin #SomaticWork #NervousSystemSupport #PelvicHealth

Szukam aktora do wertykalnego serialu!
Poszukuję aktora w wieku 40-50 lat z bardzo dobrą znajomością języka angielskiego.
Okres zdjęć: 19–30 kwietnia (2–3 dni zdjęciowe dla tej roli) w Warsaw.
Serial **„BRAVE DOLL”** na platformie MyDrama.
Stawka wynosi **1600 zł brutto** za dzień zdjęciowy.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany, poproszę o nagranie self-tape’u
Poproszę również o następujące informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, lokalizacja, wzrost, doświadczenie aktorskie / wykształcenie aktorskie, a także aktualne zdjęcie portretowe

Proszę pisać w wiadomościach prywatnych z z notatką THOMAS — prześlę scenę do nagrania.

Deadline do 08.03 do 12:00

items.previewTitle:
CALLING ALL QUEER READERS & CREW
Want to be a part of the creative process for our feature; ‘The Suit I Buried Her In’? 

Synopsis: After the sudden death of his lover, Oliver is left to grieve alone— haunted by memories, a dysfunctional family, and a truth he never got to fully share. As he navigates his identity and the people closest to him, one question remains: Did his partner really know him at all? Did anyone really?

For questions or inquiries, DM us or send us an email at the8tharchiveprod@gmail.com

(This is a funded project and we would love for you to join us in making this film come to life!)

Follow us for more updates!

#the8tharchive #vancouverfilm #tsibhi #screenplay #crewcall

items.text:
**PAID CASTING CALL – NORTH VANCOUVER**
Elumind, a brain & mental health centre, is producing **social media and digital content** and is looking for 3** actors or students** to appear in our campaign.
We want authentic, real faces, with some acting experience required!
**Roles:**
* 2 Female Actresses (24+) - Confident, warm presence, comfortable on camera
* 1 Male Actor (24+) - Grounded, professional energy, comfortable on camera

**Details:**
* 4 hrs/day (two days total)
* North Vancouver location
* **Total Pay:** $166 per actor for both days
* Variety of contents (details of contents will be discussed during the Zoom call when selected)
* Non-union, beginner/student-friendly

**What We’re Looking For:**
* Age 24+
* Comfortable on camera, natural presence
* Reliable and professional

**To Apply:**
Email marketing@elumind.com with:
* 1–3 headshots or a portfolio (if available) with any past works. (acting, modelling, video, etc.)
* Short note about yourself and why you want to participate
> Selected applicants will be contacted and scheduled for a Zoom call.

topComments.text: Please share pay rates in your casting call. Thanks!

topComments.text:
Genre : comedy, drama 

Based in : UK 

Recorded in : the Wirral 
Filming locations : Wirral 
Filming date : April/may - ongoing 

Premise : an unlikely group of friends from a multitude of backgrounds including highschool drop outs, educated college students, and even a low time drug dealer. Set between 2000s and 2015, this series shows friendship is messy and chaotic, pulling no punches, this group is unpredictable and at times emotional, but always "real". 

Tone : nostalgic, friendly, comedic, 

Characters : 

.Izzy pastel - smart student with a down to earth personality, attends college, always having banter with the lads and able to keep up, mental sparring is her Forte. [ Free ] 

.Jamie "ash" carter - rough around the edges but lovable, college drop out ( kick out), enjoys art, joking, and smoking. 
[ Taken ] 

.Ryan carter - older brother to Jamie. Shy, calm, and reserved, doesn't talk much but when he does it's comedy gold. 
[ Free ] 

.Eddie sharp - close friends with the carter brothers, they all went to school together, consistently unemployed, low time drug dealer. 
[ Taken ] 

.Callum nightly - loves being the centre of attention, close friendship with Eddie due to consist drug use. Can sometimes be erratic. 
[ Free ] 

. Sophie frost - blonde, chaotic, extreme drug user, loves raves festivals and flirting, the group help her slow down from her fast paced lifestyle. 
[ Free ] 

.Ethan shroud - althletic rugby player, trains week days, parties weekends, knows his limits and dosnt take things too far, slightly better off than the rest of the group but always shares the wealth. 
[ Free ] 

Simon Skinner "psycho si" - local bully, always taking stuff from the group, hates everyone, hated by everyone. Loose cannon, can switch mood in an instance.
[ Free ] 

EXTRAS : 
all extra positions available 

Production crew : 
Director
Sound engineer
Editer 

Pay and travel : possible compensation | travel covered | 

Credits : full credits with legal or chosen name 

Character wardrobes : 

.Jamie "ash" carter - button up shirts, patterns, jeans, denim jackets, caps,

.Ryan carter - hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Izzy pastel - jumpers, skirts, jeans, hoodies, 

.Eddie sharp - tracksuits, beanies, trainers, 

.Ethan shroud - jumpers, sports jerseys, jeans, boots,

.Callum nightly - windbreakers, tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Evie Owens - shirts, jeans, leopard prints 

.Simon Skinner "psycho Simon" - tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, caps, Burberry 

NOTE : MUST BE COMFORTABLE SMOKING EFFECT CIGARETTES
Season 1 confirmed? With whom? If it's confirmed why is it unpaid?

items.title: Casting Call!

items.text:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume 

• Reel or self tape dark comedy scene/monologue

• Subject line: HOTLINE CASTING - [your name and role]

• Availability weekends in May and June if unavailable May 16, 17

SHOOTING SCHEDULE: Full weekend in May (16, 17)

FILMING LOCATION: Denver/Boulder area, all locations indoors

TW: suicide and active shooter, sexual situations (dialogue only)

Thank you!

items.text:
**ATTENTION ACTORS/READERS!!**

Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole are doing a virtual table read for Emily's feature film script "Marshlights" on Sunday, March 15th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. Emily is seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future. 

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately. 

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis. 

**The narration role and the role of Mrs. Ashford have already been cast.**

Marshlights Table Read

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: Sunday, March 15th @ 2-5pm

WHO: Written by Emily Stephens, Casting by Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole

PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (91 pages)

SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

CHARACTERS:

 

**Luke/Lucy** (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit):  a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively even flirtatious.

**Mark** (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.

**Esau **(white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity.

**Pastor Green** (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.

**Colonel Ashford** (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.

**Mahala** (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore.

**Amos**(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

**Mrs. Prioleau**(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe.

**Saint Lucia** (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

There are number of smaller or unnamed characters for small scenes, the readers of Saint Lucia and Mrs. Prioleau will cover those roles. 

SUBMIT TO: marybetheversole@gmail.com with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. 

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. **

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

Szukam aktora do wertykalnego serialu!
Poszukuję aktora w wieku 40-50 lat z bardzo dobrą znajomością języka angielskiego.
Okres zdjęć: 19–30 kwietnia (2–3 dni zdjęciowe dla tej roli) w Warsaw.
Serial **„BRAVE DOLL”** na platformie MyDrama.
Stawka wynosi **1600 zł brutto** za dzień zdjęciowy.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany, poproszę o nagranie self-tape’u
Poproszę również o następujące informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, lokalizacja, wzrost, doświadczenie aktorskie / wykształcenie aktorskie, a także aktualne zdjęcie portretowe

Proszę pisać w wiadomościach prywatnych z z notatką THOMAS — prześlę scenę do nagrania.

Deadline do 08.03 do 15:00

items.text:
Wrocław, film dyplomowy, płatne!

Hej, do filmu dyplomowego na ASP "KORZENIE" poszukuję aktorki dostępnej między 6 a 12 kwietnia.

EWA - ok 30-35 lat, ciężarna żona jednego z głównych bohaterów. Inteligentna, wysoce empatyczna. Stara się pomóc szwagrowi przez subtelne tworzenie okazji, podczas których bracia będą mogli porozmawiać na osobności.

Preferowane ciemniejsze włosy, ale nie jest to wymóg. Zdjęcie wyłącznie podglądowe.

Film realizowany jest w grupie [Kinofaktura](https://www.facebook.com/groups/184277054929526/user/61553716839681/?__cft__[0]=AZbRJj-3xtv9zAEhlDvLHIeIY5yWbDbNHwy4JVg1ju8rVo5ImHBUF1EXCupOjpcnxHo3gKSzSwAhdWvnNZ-fgJRXfjyELTb8RGR5NI-MzN151UPi3Pw1pePVp0N23z9TfIi1Xt_9McAfTWG_TXZJCWfx&__tn__=-]K-R)

Zgłoszenia: kinofaktura@asp.wroc.pl

items.text:
JOIN THE CAST NOW!
A couple on the run comes across a mysterious item in the deserted woods only for it to later put them in a deadly and dangerous situation where they will have to fight for their lives to see each other again!

Becka and Steven’s relationship is one of the most powerful relationships one could have. their love strengthens their will to fight. These characters are very personal to me as they represent having strength in the midst of chaos.

DM @FBNFilms_ on IG for Audition and Interest Information!

 

CASTING FOR ROLES OF: 

(Steven - 20’s - 30’s)

(Becka - 20’s - 30’s)

This Project is located in the Myrtle Beach/ South Carolina Area. 

This project is a non-paid role because of low budget and inability to compensate as of now. No Lodging Providing. Food And Scripts Will Be Provided If Your Audition Goes To The Next Step

Please Send in a Self-Tape reading lines from the Opening Scene (Lines Will Be Provide) 

Email The Audition Tape to: NaevactoManagement@Gmail.com — in Myrtle Beach.

items.text:
🎬 **AUDITION CALL — PAID FILM ROLE**  
Holywood Studios U.S. is casting **one male and one female actor**, both in their early 30s, for a **featured scene** in an upcoming faith-centered film.

📍 **Location:** Filming will take place **under the iconic tree at Holywood Studios** in Harriman, TN.
📅 **Date:** Approximately **one month from now** (exact date will be will confirmed soon after Auditions).
💰 **Compensation:** Paid role 

👗 **Wardrobe: **will be provided
* **Male:** Wedding tuxedo (provided or approved)
* **Female:** Wedding dress (provided or approved)

🎥 This is a **cinematic, emotionally rich scene** with strong visual storytelling. Some dialogue required, but expressive presence is key.

We’re looking for actors and actresses who can embody **grace, depth, and authenticity** in a moment that reflects love, commitment, and spiritual beauty.

📩 **To audition, please send your headshot, resume, and availability to:**  
📧 [auditions@holywoodstudios.us]

**Holywood Studios U.S.**  
Executive Director: BillyBow Aguirre, Executive Director of Holywood Studios U.S.
Faith. Film. Legacy.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of chipmunk and text that says 'HOL HOLYWOOD STUDIOS บ.ร.'

topComments.text:
As of today, we are officially holding preliminary screening for the auditions.  
If you feel led to submit, please send your materials to the email provided in the post.  
May God bless you in all you pursue. Jesus is the only name to remember.

items.text:
Hi Actors-

Our **FREE SELF-TAPE WORKSHOP** at The WholeHearted Actor💛 is this **Tuesday 3/10**.  Submit a self-tape and we'll review it live in our zoom classroom, and unpack everything from your technical set-up to your process and interpretation.  Whether you choose to send a tape or not - all are welcome.  It's so valuable getting watch and learn from fellow actor's audition tapes. 

SIGN UP HERE: 
[www.thewholeheartedactor.as.me/FREE-Self-TapeWorkshop](http://www.thewholeheartedactor.as.me/FREE-Self-TapeWorkshop)

items.text:
Extras Wanted – Short Film “March On”

We are looking for extras based in London to appear in our upcoming graduate short film “March On.”

About the Film:
March On is a character-driven drama set in the 1980s following the Falklands War, exploring the lasting psychological impact of conflict and the challenges veterans face as they return to everyday life.

Filming Dates:
16th, 17th, and 18th of March
(London locations)

We are looking for people of various ages and backgrounds to appear as background extras and help bring the world of the film to life. No acting experience is required, and this is a voluntary opportunity to gain on-set experience and be part of a passionate graduate film production.

If you are interested in taking part, please get in touch for more details. Email us at Marchon.Shortfilm@gmail.com .

sharedPost.text:
Episode 2 is now available to watch on Youtube. 

Mutterings:- a privately expressed complaint or expression of dissatisfaction.

Chris Brake has written 11 black comedy monologue episodes on this very subject each offering a tantalizing look at the innermost thoughts and feelings of each of the wonderfully written characters. 

Please like and support the channel so more original content like this can be featured.

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

**Schauspieler sucht Kurzfilm- / Studentenfilmprojekte im Raum Augsburg/München und vergleichbar**

ich bin Schauspieler aus dem Raum Augsburg/München und auf der Suche nach ernsthaften
Kurzfilm-, Studenten- oder Abschlussfilmproduktionen mit künstlerischem Anspruch.
Interesse besteht vor allem an

**Hauptrollen oder tragenden Nebenrollen** 

in Projekten mit Festivalziel oder professionellem Produktionsniveau. Theatererfahrung vorhanden, zuverlässig bei Proben und Dreharbeiten. Ein Showreel ist im Aufbau, Material kann auf Anfrage gesendet werden. Auch oﬀen für 

**Zusammenarbeit mit Regie- oder Produktionsteams an eigenen oder neuen Kurzfilmprojekten**.

Herzliche Grüße,
Thorin Kiel

items.text:
⭐️EVC Talent Casting Show 2026⭐️

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

Wir öffnen unsere Bühne für:

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Bands & Musikprojekte

„Dein Talent kennt keine Grenzen“

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Tänzer & Tänzerinnen (Solo, Duo oder Crew)

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
**[CREW CALL: TRADE & BARTER] – LA/Burbank – Narrative Vertical Series **

I’m producing a 3-episode narrative series titled **"Kandor Kin."** This is a "Live Classroom" project focused on the contrast between industry exploitation and the safety of a self-sustaining creative ecosystem.

**The Project:**
* **Format:** 3 Vertical Episodes (approx. 1 min each)
* **Shoot Time:** 6–7 hour window (One Day)
* **Location:** Basecamp (Burbank)
* **Date:** Late March

**Looking For:**
* **DP / Videographers:** High-impact, narrative-style shooters.
* **Gaffer:** Lighting is the "lead character" here—we need to visually separate the "Cold Industry" from the "Warm Kin" environment.

**The Reality:** This is an unpaid production for our nonprofit arm, but **Kollective Kandor** doesn't believe in "free." We believe in mutual sustainability and circulating resources.

**In exchange for your talent/gear, I am offering:**
1. **LOCATION SPONSORSHIP:** Access/Sponsorship for a restaurant or food truck location for your next project.
2. **ORIGINAL SCORE:** I will provide custom music composition/scoring for your next visual project (under 10 mins).
3. **CASTING:** Access to our curated roster of actors for your future productions.

If you’re tired of the "starving artist" gatekeeping and want to build a healthier ecosystem while getting high-end narrative content for your reel, let’s talk.

**DROP your role + your choice of exchange below, or DM me with your reel/work.**

items.text:
BOXING FITNESS
My name is Rameses. I’m a professional boxer currently in fight camp training in Hollywood at the legendary Wild Card Boxing Club under Hall-of-Fame trainer.
During camp I have a limited number of afternoon training sessions available (12:00pm–3:30pm, Monday–Friday) for anyone interested in learning real boxing technique or incorporating boxing conditioning into their fitness routine.
Boxing is one of the most efficient workouts available and is used by many actors and professionals to build conditioning, coordination, and mental focus.

Who this is for: 
• Beginners 
• Adults & Busy professionals who want an efficient, focused workout
• Women interested in boxing for confidence & self-defense
• Kids and teens 
• Athletes wanting to sharpen skills, speed & coordination

Sessions focus on: 
🥊 Boxing fundamentals
🥊 Mitt work and footwork
🥊 Conditioning and core strength
🥊 Skill development and movement

All levels welcome, including complete beginners.
If you’re interested in training or want more information, feel free to send me a message.

Thanks everyone.

items.text:
UPDATED: NOW OFFERING RELOCATION FOR THE RIGHT CANDIDATE

 

If you know of an Executive/ Personal Assistant that has worked for UHNW or A-list celebs long term and is looking for work in NYC, please send them my way! This is 100% a lifestyle position and the people who will be considered will have had solid experience over the past 5-10 years (minimum) with ONE to TWO heavily traveled, fast paced principals full time. If you have had more than three positions over the past 10 years you will not be considered, proven longevity in a fast paced environment is what this client is looking for. 

Feel free to share with qualified candidates and please do not DM me on FB. Send resumes to Bridget@slggroupstaffing.com or call me at (347)405-1665

Thank you! 

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / PERSONAL ASSISTANT (ON-CALL HANDLER)-NEW YORK, NY (Relocation offered for the right candidate)

This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references
