This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED FOR SPIDER-MAN FAN FILM NON-PAYED 

We are currently casting a small group of background extras for an emotional street scene in our upcoming Spider-Man fan film, “Becoming Our Spider-Man.”

SCENE DESCRIPTION:  
This scene takes place after Spider-Man fails to save one of his allies and is left injured and emotionally broken while the Hobgoblin threatens to finish him. A group of everyday New Yorkers step forward to defend Spider-Man, standing between him and the villain. Inspired by the powerful “You wanna get to him, you gotta go through me” moment, the people of the city remind Spider-Man that it wasn’t his fault, that he tried his best, and that even heroes can’t save everyone. The crowd encourages him to get back up and stop the Goblin.

WHO WE NEED:
• Around 10 background extras  
• All genders, ages 18+  
• Any ethnicity  
• Comfortable performing crowd reactions and possibly a few short supportive lines

PAY / COMPENSATION:
• Volunteer / unpaid background role  
• Food and drinks will be provided on set  
• Great opportunity for actors who want experience in a dramatic superhero scene

LOCATION:
London area (exact filming location will be provided after casting)

TO APPLY:
Please send the following:
• Name  
• Age  
• A recent photo/headshot  
• Any acting experience 

Email submissions to: ppeterb954@gmail.com

Subject line: “Spider-Man Extras Casting”

Be part of the crowd that reminds Spider-Man why the city still believes in him.

items.summary:
# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

Full Programme and Ticket Link:

# www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

See you there!!!

items.text:
Work in Cyprus for Energetic & Creative People!
Become an Animator! 

Do you dream of working by the sea, performing under the sun, meeting people from all over the world, and gaining unforgettable experience?
Then this opportunity is for YOU!

We are looking for animators and dancers ready to bring energy, эмоotions, and unforgettable vibes to the season!

✨ What we offer:
• Competitive salary
• Official employment
• Free accommodation & meals
• Training (for animators) + professional rehearsals (for dancers)
• Friendly international team
• Creative atmosphere and daily shows
• Sun, sea, and bright emotions every single day

📅 Schedule: 6 days per week

🔎 Who we’re looking for:
• Conversational English
• High energy & strong communication skills
• Dancers (any style welcome – show, modern, latin, commercial, etc.)
• Positive attitude & team spirit

📩 Send your CV + videos (for dancers) to:
hr.gbagency.cy@gmail.com

Spend this season under the Cyprus sun and make memories that last a lifetime ☀️✨

items.text:
9ª edición de la Residencia artística 
Gestualidad del Cuerpo Colectivo
🗓 Del 3 al 8 de abril
📍Hacienda Paucartika, Lamay

Durante 6 días habitaremos el Valle Sagrado para crear desde el cuerpo, el paisaje y la cosmovisión andina como espejo vivo: como es arriba, es abajo.

Un espacio para artistas, investigadores, estudiantes, creadores y personas de distintos campos —con o sin experiencia— que deseen profundizar en sus procesos personales y colectivos a través del movimiento, laboratorios de creación interdisciplinares, el intercambio cultural y la vida compartida.

Montañas como testigo, nos volvemos a encontrar para seguir preguntándonos: ¿qué gesto necesita hoy el cuerpo colectivo?

Gracias a quienes han sido parte de este espacio todos estos años. 

📣Inscripciones abiertas.
¡Bienvenidos todos los saberes!

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
Hi all! I am producing and directing a narrative driven spec later this month and am looking to cast actors for five short vignettes about music and the moments it lives inside. Filming will be in Langley/Vancouver.

We have multiple roles ranging from early 20s to 80, non-speaking and speaking, comedy and grief. I've attached a deck below with more info on each role and how to submit. 

Shooting March 21st in Langley and March 22nd in Vancouver. Actors will only be needed for a few hours on their respective shoot day, not both days. 

Here's a link to a shortened visual treatment so you can get an idea for the creative: https://www.canva.com/design/DAHDBgb7Jd8/X1jTEJO0-TCRNRth6Q1qKA/view?utm_content=DAHDBgb7Jd8&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=uniquelinks&utlId=hf7a06d86aa

TO SUBMIT: Email [caitlyn@bellow.ca](mailto:caitlyn@bellow.ca) with the subject line: [Your Name — Role Name]

Include a headshot, your height, a short bio, and a demo reel or self-tape. Full character breakdowns with self-tape direction are attached below! 

UBCP/ACTRA ULB or Non-Union. Unpaid. Copy, credit and meals provided.

items.text:
Casting Call (Non-Union) for ADULT MEN, ASIAN AND LATINO - Paid

Looking for actors to play the role of a parent in a simulated session with a school psychologist. The video clips will be used in an online training system for counselors and psychologists. The sessions include approximately 7-10 pages of dialogue and direct to camera questions/statements for learners.

At this time, we are casting 2 separate roles:
A LATINO father of an elementary school-aged daughter
An ASIAN father of an elementary school-aged son

All experience levels with acting are welcome to apply. We are committed to making this a respectful and safe process, with open communication and respect for boundaries.

Comfortable English fluency is required.

Expected filming dates are between March 10 through March 20, based on actor availability, but our needs are ongoing and more will occur in the future, so please submit if you're interested at all.

Location is downtown Vancouver - Gastown. Pay is $360 CAD, with the expectation of a 2 hour duration studio filming session. This rate is intended to compensate for both studio time and prep time.

Please email phil@skillsetter.com with your headshot and resume, as well as some information about you, such as gender identity, age, cultural/racial background. If you've submitted for a past session, you're welcome to submit again. We do sometimes receive more submissions than we are able to respond to, but we do read them all, and we do save your submissions for future consideration.

items.text:
We are currently doing a casting call for a group student film project called Banana Split about a young Chinese Canadian woman who wakes up stuck inside of a banana suit. In order to free herself before her mom’s Chinese New Year Party, she tries to reconnect with her Chinese roots. 

**Main Characters:**

Chloe 
* Female
* Age: 19-24
* Of Chinese descent 

Chloe’s Mom
* Female
* Age: 40-50
* Of Chinese descent
* Fluency in Mandarin is required 

Molly 
* Female
* Age: 19-24
* Of Chinese descent
* Fluency in Mandarin is required

**Minor Roles:**

Heather 
* Female
* Age: 19-24
* Caucasian 

Waiter 
* Age: 25-40
* Of Chinese descent 
* Fluency in Mandarin is required

**This film is:**
* Non-union, volunteer/unpaid with crafty and credit provided
* Potential callbacks/ chemistry read: **March 15-17th**
* Shooting:** March 18th to 24th (around 3 days of shooting, confirmed dates after callbacks)**
* Locations: Vancouver and Langley (cost of travel not provided)

Acting experience is not required, but if you do have a demo reel and/or resume, please include them in the Google form below. Additionally, most roles require fluency in Mandarin; you may also apply to more than one role.

 **The deadline to submit will be March 10th (11:59 pm).** For more details, please review the Google form! Thank you!

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScGco2zfPwGijaFQJVVVd3uun0Io7G2Zs3QuwQphnd4IkThJQ/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=103529434365702243180](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScGco2zfPwGijaFQJVVVd3uun0Io7G2Zs3QuwQphnd4IkThJQ/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=103529434365702243180)

items.text:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.summary:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

items.text:
🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

Fitting: Mar. 12th Filming: Mar. 13th and/or Mar. 28th COMPENSATION $1000+ 20% PER DAY FILMING $3000 +20% USAGE BUYOUT DEADLINE: FRIDAY, MARCH 6TH 6 PM PST'

CASTING CALL! New LIFE OF CHRIST show with The Lantern Marquee, Performing May 25-30! Auditions (video submission) due Thurs 3/12, callbacks 3/14.
Why you want to be part of it:

🪨Performing as a themed dinner theatre at Provo's historic castle amphitheater, covered in lanterns!

🪨Music ONLY, no dialogue! Rehearsal schedule workable around your life. (required on-site dates: May 18-22; 25-30, evenings)

🪨Beautiful covers of 80's songs that have been carefully curated according to their spiritual analogues. (eg. "Who Wants to Live Forever," (cover by Il Volo) originally sung by Queen, is sung by Christ and the Disciples in our show. It’s amazing check it out:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwKUxTMSs6M)

DM with questions!

Learn more and audition using this link:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IhT-JZE7AEzRCOAyqVS8P0PN6daj9G_z?usp=sharing

message.text: Ein Rosenkrieg bezeichnet eine extrem heftige, von Hass und Zerstörungswillen geprägte Scheidungs- oder Trennungsschlacht, bei der Ex-Partner versuchen, sich gegenseitig maximal zu schaden. Der Begriff leitet sich von den englischen Thronfolgekämpfen (1455–1485) zwischen den Häusern York und Lancaster ab, die Wappenrosen, so Google 🌹💥

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM

“Stars Above Us”

Filming Dates: June 5–7, 2026
Location: Bowling Green, Kentucky
Audition Type: Self-tapes only
Unpaid - student film - Non-union.

Film Plot

Stars Above Us is a powerful coming-of-age drama about friendship, mental health, and the signs people often miss.

The story follows Eli, a quiet high school student, and his best friend Lina Carmichael — a bold, rebellious girl who seems fearless on the outside. While Lina jokes, skips class, and stares at the stars dreaming of something bigger, she secretly struggles with feelings of isolation and depression.

As Eli and their friend Becca begin to notice Lina pulling away, tensions rise at school with bullying and pressure from their peers. What seems like ordinary teenage drama slowly reveals deeper pain beneath the surface. When Lina disappears from school, Eli is forced to confront the truth he never saw coming.

The film explores grief, friendship, and the importance of recognizing when someone you care about is hurting.

Character Breakdown

Lina Carmichael

Gender: Female
Age Range: 16–20 (to play 16)
Lead Role

Lina Carmichael is bold, funny, and rebellious. She walks through the halls like she owns the place — wearing ripped clothes, spiked heels, and a fearless grin. She’s the kind of person who asks ridiculous “would you rather” questions and drags her friends into skipping class just for the adventure.

But beneath the confidence, Lina feels deeply out of place in the world. She carries emotional wounds from her past and struggles with depression she doesn’t fully understand or know how to explain. At times she’s vulnerable, distant, and overwhelmed by feelings she tries to hide behind humor and attitude.

Key Traits
 • Charismatic and energetic
 • Sharp wit and sarcastic humor
 • Emotionally complex and vulnerable
 • Fiercely independent
 • Capable of explosive anger and quiet heartbreak

This role requires an actress who can balance strong personality with subtle emotional depth. Lina is both the brightest presence in the room and the quietest cry for help.

Audition Information

Audition Type: Self-Tape Submission Only

To Submit:
Email Cassidy Shortridge, Casting Coordinator at
cassidy.shortridge@yahoo.com

Include:
 • Subject Line: Your Name – Role Submission
 • Name
 • Age
 • Headshot
 • Resume (if available)
 • Self-tape audition for Lina Carmichael

message.text:
The ultimate acting tool is your eyes. Master the art of expression and join our course today, link in bio. 

#actingbysarfraz #actingschool #actingclass #aspiringactors #actingclasses #ontarioarts #becomeanactor #creativelearning #performanceart #performingarts

items.text:
🎭 **Performing Arts Classes for Children – Free Trial Available!** 🎭

Looking for a fun, confidence-building activity for your child? **P3 Performing Arts** offers exciting classes in **acting, singing and movement**, helping children grow in confidence, creativity and teamwork while having lots of fun!

✨ **Monday Classes – Starting 13th April**
📍 St Paul’s High School, Wythenshawe

✨ **Thursday Classes – Open Now**
📍 St Werburgh’s Church Hall, Chorlton 

Children can come along and **try a class for FREE** to see if they enjoy it before signing up.

Sign up for your free trial here:
[https://p3-performing-arts.classforkids.io](https://p3-performing-arts.classforkids.io/)

Feel free to comment or message if you have any questions – we’d love to welcome your child to **P3 Performing Arts!**🎭

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of dancing and text that says 'BOK NOW FREE Trial P3Performing Available P3 Arts P3 PERFORMING ARTS Teaching confidence through the power of performance. NEW Monday Classes Paul's High School, Wythenshawe 3-6years 3-6 3 years 5pm-6:15pm 7 7-18 18 years 5:15T-8p Thursday Classes St Werburgh's Hall, Chorlton 3-6years 3-6 years 5pm-6:15pm 7. 7-18 18 years 5:15T-8 Training in Acting, Singing and Dance by Industry professionals for children aged 3-18 years. 07508 242522 deejay@p3performingarts.c.uk deejay'

items.text: Looking for two female actors for a CU Denver short film! Shooting dates are March 24 and March 26. Self tape submission deadline is March 12. Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'Casting Call Unpaid Student Film PAPER TWO LIFELONG BEST crowns FRIENDS COPE WITH AN UNEXPECTED 8 MAGGIE PREGNANCY SCARE BY REVISITING THE WHIMSICAL RITUALS OF THEIR CHILDHOOD. FEMALE, 18-23 SENSITIVE AND EMOTIONALLY TRANSPARENT. MAGGIE FEELS EVERYTHING DEEPLY AND STRUGGLES to HIDE IT. CLARA FEMALE, 18-23 GROUNDED, PLAYFUL, AND INSTINCTIVELY NURTURING. CLARA MASKS FEAR WITH HUMOR AND IMAGINATION. Contact: discodogproductions22@gma a @gmail.c For Information and Sides'

topComments.text: Hi! My name is Hanna Palmer and I’m a teen actress with several theater productions under my belt who is currently building my career. I really appreciate the resources you share for actors. I’m interested in pursuing more film and TV opportunities and was wondering if you might have any advice or if you’re currently open to submissions or new talent. Thank you so much for your time!

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

# **WE HAVE CASTED ALL ROLES!!**

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of bed, bedroom and text

topComments.text: I would so love to audition for this… dang… did you know SAG has a specific signatory available for student films? It’s very accessible and will allow you to include SAG actors in your projects.
I don't see a link as well!@ i would love to audition

items.text:
NOW ACCEPTING ALL SIGN UPS!
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 

Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.
